---
title: "Heat Study: Updates 4.20.26"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
---

## Outline 

::: {.incremental}
1. Updates on **outdoor** temperature model & data preparation
2. **Indoor** temperature assignments: moving from RECs to NREL ReStock
3. Re-thinking linkage framework 
4. Making predictive model approach more concrete with NREL temperature load variables 
:::

# Outdoor Temperature Updates

# Indoor Temperature Updates 

## Probablistic Linkage | (Hopefully) the last refresher {.smaller}

```{=html}
<style>
/* Grouping/blocking variables (Climate, House Type, Year Built) - purple */
.group-header { background-color: #b8a9c9; }
.group-cell { background-color: #d9d0e3; }
/* Distance matching variables (Total Rooms, Elec Expend) - blue */
.distance-header { background-color: #8fafd7; }
.distance-cell { background-color: #c5d5ea; }
/* Linkage box */
.linkage-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d97b3d 0%, #b85c28 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 15px 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}
/* Result labels */
.linked-label {
  background-color: #fcd5b4;
  color: #8b4513;
  font-size: 0.7em;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.imputed-label {
  background-color: #f5a5a5;
  color: #8b0000;
  font-size: 0.7em;
  font-weight: bold;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.warning-text {
  margin-top: 30px;
  padding: 15px;
  background-color: #fff5f5;
  border-left: 4px solid #d97b3d;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}
</style>

<div class="diagram-container">

  <div class="data-section">
    <div class="section-label">RECS Data</div>
    <table class="data-table">
      <tr>
        <th class="group-header">Climate<br>Region</th>
        <th class="group-header">House<br>Type</th>
        <th class="group-header">Year<br>Built</th>
        <th class="distance-header">Total<br>Rooms</th>
        <th class="distance-header">Elec<br>Expend</th>
        <th class="indoor-header">Prototype<br>Variables</th>
      </tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
    </table>
    <div style="font-size: 0.7em; color: #666; margin-top: 5px;">~3,700 households (36% usable)</div>

    <div class="section-label" style="margin-top: 15px;">PUMS Data</div>
    <table class="data-table">
      <tr>
        <th class="group-header">Climate<br>Region</th>
        <th class="group-header">House<br>Type</th>
        <th class="group-header">Year<br>Built</th>
        <th class="distance-header">Total<br>Rooms</th>
        <th class="distance-header">Elec<br>Expend</th>
        <th class="pums-header">Health<br>Outcomes</th>
      </tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="group-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="distance-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td></tr>
    </table>
    <div style="font-size: 0.7em; color: #666; margin-top: 5px;">~830K households</div>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow-container">→</div>

  <div class="data-section" style="justify-content: center; margin-top: 30px;">
    <div class="linkage-box">
      🔗 Min Distance<br>Linkage
    </div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.65em; color: #666; margin-top: 8px; text-align: center;">
      Group on climate, house type, year<br>
      Match on rooms + electricity
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow-container">→</div>

  <div class="data-section">
    <div class="section-label">Linked PUMS Data</div>
    <table class="data-table">
      <tr>
        <th class="pums-header">Household<br>Chars</th>
        <th class="pums-header">Health<br>Outcomes</th>
        <th class="indoor-header">Prototype Variables<br>(from RECS)</th>
      </tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"><span class="linked-label">LINKED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"><span class="linked-label">LINKED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"><span class="linked-label">LINKED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"><span class="linked-label">LINKED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"><span class="linked-label">LINKED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td style="background-color: #f5a5a5;"><span class="imputed-label">IMPUTED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td style="background-color: #f5a5a5;"><span class="imputed-label">IMPUTED</span></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td style="background-color: #f5a5a5;"><span class="imputed-label">IMPUTED</span></td></tr>
    </table>
    <div style="font-size: 0.7em; color: #666; margin-top: 5px;">~830K households linked</div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="fragment">
<strong>Goal:</strong> Assign each PUMs / MDAC respondent a set of housing prototype variables.
</div>
<div class="fragment">
<strong>Problem:</strong> As we'll see in a few, it yields implausible results. (I tried so hard).
</div>
```

## What is NREL ResStock? {.smaller}

```{=html}
<style>
.resstock-explainer {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 15px;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.resstock-col {
  flex: 1;
}
.resstock-card {
  background-color: #f0f6fb;
  border-left: 4px solid #7eb8da;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 12px 15px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  font-size: 0.8em;
}
.resstock-card .card-title {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.95em;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  color: #2a6496;
}
.resstock-card .card-body {
  color: #444;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.resstock-highlight {
  background-color: #e8f4ea;
  border-left: 4px solid #5a9e6f;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 12px 15px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-size: 0.82em;
}
.resstock-highlight .card-title {
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #2d6a4f;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
</style>

<div class="resstock-explainer">

  <div class="resstock-col">
    <div class="resstock-card fragment">
      <div class="card-title">What it is</div>
      <div class="card-body">A national <strong>residential building energy model</strong> developed by NREL. It simulates the physics-based energy performance of <strong>~550,000 synthetic U.S. housing units</strong> — each representing ~250 real homes.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="resstock-card fragment">
      <div class="card-title">How it's built</div>
      <div class="card-body">Housing characteristics (location, vintage, floor area, HVAC type, insulation, income, etc.) are drawn from national surveys (Census, ACS, AHS, RECS) as <strong>conditional probability distributions</strong>, then sampled to create a realistic synthetic stock.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="resstock-col">
    <div class="resstock-card fragment">
      <div class="card-title">What it simulates</div>
      <div class="card-body">Each synthetic home is run through <strong>EnergyPlus</strong> — a physics simulation engine — producing 15-minute resolution outputs: energy use, cooling load delivered, heating load, indoor temperatures, and more.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="resstock-highlight fragment">
      <div class="card-title">Why it matters for us</div>
      <div class="card-body">Although ReStock characterizes a more recent year of housing stock (2019) than our MDAC cohort's first year (2008), its <strong>larger number of observations</strong>, <strong>improved geographic granularity</strong>, and <strong>direct applicability to Chima's building simulations</strong> make it a stronger data source than RECs. </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

```




## Why do I think this? (PUMs | RECs Prototype vs NREL ReStock)

## New Approach: Predictive Modeling {.smaller}

```{=html}
<style>
.data-table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.7em;
  margin: 10px auto;
}
.data-table th {
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #666;
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}
.data-table td {
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #999;
  height: 18px;
}
.resstock-header { background-color: #7eb8da; }
.resstock-cell { background-color: #b8d4e8; }
.indoor-header { background-color: #f4a460; }
.indoor-cell { background-color: #fcd5b4; }
.pums-header { background-color: #9bc49b; }
.pums-cell { background-color: #c6e0c6; }
.predict-header { background-color: #d4a5d4; }
.predict-cell { background-color: #e8cce8; }
.section-label {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  text-align: left;
}
.arrow-container {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 2em;
  color: #666;
  margin: 0 15px;
}
.model-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #69c 0%, #47a 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 15px 20px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: bold;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
}
.diagram-container {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.data-section {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.goal-text {
  margin-top: 30px;
  padding: 15px;
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
  border-left: 4px solid #69c;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}
.pipeline-container {
  margin-top: 25px;
  padding: 15px;
  background-color: #fafafa;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}
.pipeline-label {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #555;
}
.pipeline-steps {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
}
.pipeline-step {
  padding: 10px 15px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-align: center;
  min-width: 110px;
}
.pipeline-step.current {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #69c 0%, #47a 100%);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 2px 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}
.pipeline-step.future {
  background-color: #e8e8e8;
  color: #666;
  border: 1px dashed #aaa;
}
.step-number {
  font-size: 0.7em;
  opacity: 0.8;
}
.step-title {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin: 3px 0;
}
.step-desc {
  font-size: 0.65em;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.pipeline-arrow {
  font-size: 1.3em;
  color: #999;
}
</style>

<div class="diagram-container">

  <div class="data-section">
    <div class="section-label">NREL ResStock + EnergyPlus (Chima's Prototypes)</div>
    <table class="data-table">
      <tr>
        <th class="resstock-header">Climate<br>Zone</th>
        <th class="resstock-header">Type of<br>House</th>
        <th class="resstock-header">Year<br>Built</th>
        <th class="resstock-header">...</th>
        <th class="indoor-header">Indoor<br>Temp 🌡️</th>
      </tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="resstock-cell"></td><td class="indoor-cell"></td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow-container">→</div>

  <div class="data-section" style="justify-content: center; margin-top: 40px;">
    <div class="model-box">
      🔧 Build<br>Predictive Model
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="arrow-container">→</div>

  <div class="data-section">
    <div class="section-label">PUMS Microdata</div>
    <table class="data-table">
      <tr>
        <th class="pums-header">Household<br>Chars</th>
        <th class="pums-header">Heating/Cooling<br>Trends</th>
        <th class="pums-header">PUMA<br>Sociodemo</th>
        <th class="predict-header">Predicted<br>Temp 🌡️</th>
      </tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
      <tr><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="pums-cell"></td><td class="predict-cell"></td></tr>
    </table>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="fragment">
<strong>Goal:</strong> Train model on ResStock (where we have simulated indoor temps), then apply to PUMS (where we have health outcomes) using predictors available in PUMS.
</div>
<div class="fragment">
<strong>Key Difference:</strong> Rather than link every housing prototype variable to PUMs data, focus only <strong>indoor temperature</strong>.
</div>
```

## Predictive Model Based Workflow {.smaller}

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-container">
  <div class="pipeline-label">Modeling Pipeline (stratified by climate zone)</div>
  <div class="pipeline-steps">
    <div class="pipeline-step current">
      <div class="step-number">1</div>
      <div class="step-title">Assess</div>
      <div class="step-desc">Compare models<br>(LM, Lasso, Ridge,<br>XGB, RF) via 10-fold CV</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-arrow">→</div>
    <div class="pipeline-step future">
      <div class="step-number">2</div>
      <div class="step-title">Tune</div>
      <div class="step-desc">Hyperparameter<br>tuning on<br>best model(s)</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-arrow">→</div>
    <div class="pipeline-step future">
      <div class="step-number">3</div>
      <div class="step-title">Holdout</div>
      <div class="step-desc">Evaluate tuned<br>model on 20%<br>test set</div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-arrow">→</div>
    <div class="pipeline-step future">
      <div class="step-number">4</div>
      <div class="step-title">Apply OOS</div>
      <div class="step-desc">Predict indoor<br>temp for PUMS<br>respondents</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```


## Working with 15-minute interval ReStock Data {.smaller}

Incorporating more granular indoor & outdoor temperature data quickly becomes a big
data challenge:

#### Napkin Math
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
#| collapse: true

## For the whole country 
scales::number(550000 * 4 * 24 * 365, scale = 1e-9, suffix = " billion", accuracy = 0.001)

#' But we can reduce our overhead by working with daily values, which is more manageable
#' Scaling to weeks, months etc., shrinks the overhead more.
scales::number(550000 * 365, scale = 1e-6, suffix = " million", accuracy = 0.001)


```

Depending on how many sites, this number becomes even more manageable. 
::: 

#### Some Thoughts 
::: {.column width="50%"}
1. The more granular the outdoor temperature data, the more accurate our predictions will 
be
2. But the worse our computational problem will be. 
3. 

:::



::::

## Sample PA Query


## Next Steps for Building out models 

1. Getting data together
2. Incorporating time and repeat observations into the model evaluation strategy
3. Adding temperature predictors into the models.
